headline: Got $2,000? This Stock Has A 27-Year Dividend Streak And Its On Sale
summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ:HON) fits a multi-decade hold thesis because it pairs a diversified, mission-critical industrial portfolio with a 27-year record of uninterrupted dividend growth, and the recent 10.04% one-week pullback to $213.97 marks a notable pullback for long-term investors ahead of the June 29, 2026 Aerospace spin-off. This is a hold for the next 20 years. ... Got $2,000? This Stock Has A 27-Year Dividend Streak And Its On Sale

headline: Here Are Wednesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: BILL Holdings, Cava Group, Entergy, GlobalFoundries, Hess Midstream, Nike, Pfizer, SharkNinja, STMicroelectronics, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower after the stock market tried to take a cue from Monday’s action, and things didn’t work out quite as well on Tuesday. Once again, the market gapped open higher as the “Buy the dip” legions came in to ride what they thought would be another wave higher, only ... headline: Honeywell (HON) Sticks with Full-Year Forecast as Aerospace Separation Nears
summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy According to D. E. Shaw. On June 8, Reuters reported that Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) reaffirmed its full-year adjusted profit and sales forecast as the company prepares to spin off its aerospace business in the coming weeks. Honeywell Aerospace, which manufactures […]
